content:
Ilana Awoṣe ABA 4.7 lori iṣiro ibamu asọtẹlẹ (predictive model validation) n beere pe awọn agbẹjọro ile (bank examiners) gbọdọ rii daju pe awọn awoṣe ewu ilana ti awọn ile-ifowopamọ nlo ni a ṣe ayẹwo ati tunṣe ni gbogbo mẹẹdogun (quarterly). 

Lati le pade ibeere atunṣe yii, awọn ile-ifowopamọ maa n lo:

1. **Awọn irinṣẹ iṣakoso awoṣe (Model Governance Tools):** Awọn eto wọnyi n ṣe iranlọwọ lati tọpinpin, ṣe ayẹwo, ati ṣe imudojuiwọn awọn awoṣe ni akoko, pẹlu awọn ilana iṣakoso eewu awoṣe (model risk management frameworks).

2. **Sọfitiwia iṣiro ati asọtẹlẹ (Statistical and Predictive Modeling Software):**
